title: Root’s Plan (resolved — with hooks)
bodyText: **Root is dead (S20).** What's known: the secret dig, the sealed guild, the sickness callousness, Tad's mission — all confirmed by [[roots-journal]]. What died with him: his claimed **"access to a hidden source of powerful magic"** and the true shape of his **business with Mr. Spells**. The old genocide-alliance draft is quarantined in [[ideas-parking-lot]] unless resurrected.
